hook: I built PepTrack because I was tracking my injections in the Notes app and a spreadsheet that I never opened.
body: It started as a personal problem. I wanted one private place to log a shot, set a reminder, and see my own history without digging through screenshots. So I made it. Local-first, no account required.
cta: PepTrack is on the App Store if you want a simpler place to keep your own records.

hook: Your tracking data should belong to you. Full stop.
body: PepTrack is local-first and private. Your logs, reminders, and notes live on your device. No social feed, no required account, no selling your data. Just a calm place to keep your own records organized.
cta: Download PepTrack on the App Store to keep your tracking private.

hook: "Where does my data go?" should be the first question for any health app.
